zachary_hung.name: Zachary Hung
zachary_hung.summary: Zachary Hung is just getting started on the junior badminton circuit with 1 tournament entry. Every champion's story has a beginning, and this is Zachary's.

zachary_wang.name: Zachary Wang
zachary_wang.summary:
Zachary Wang has reached the Finals 1 time, proving the ability to compete at the very highest level. With 45 entries across 17 tournaments, Zachary is building a body of work that points toward big things ahead.

A true triple-threat, Zachary competes across singles, doubles, and mixed doubles — boasting a doubles best of #2, a mixed doubles best of #4. The ability to excel in all three disciplines reveals a player with both the individual brilliance to dominate rallies and the court sense to thrive with a partner.

Zachary has demonstrated remarkable doubles adaptability, partnering with 15 different players across the career. Key partnerships:
  • Eddie Sun — a trusted BD partner (8 events, best result: #3)
  • Ethan Yip Ly — 3 events in BD, best: #3
  • Shivani Ramakrishnan — 3 events in XD, best: #4

A veteran of the junior circuit, Zachary has competed across U11, U13 and U15, accumulating invaluable experience at every age group. That depth of competitive history is an asset that younger opponents simply cannot replicate.

Zachary has competed across 5 different regions of the country (NE, NW, NorCal, SoCal, South), demonstrating a willingness to travel and test the game against diverse styles of play from coast to coast.

With 4 seasons of competitive experience under the belt, Zachary brings the kind of tournament-tested composure that only comes from years of stepping onto the court and competing against the best.

2024-2025.t: 2025 YONEX Dave Freeman Jr. SoCal OLC

Zack has competed at both U11 and U13, showing the adaptability needed to thrive as the competition grows fiercer with each age group.

Zack has competed across 5 different regions of the country (NE, NW, NorCal, SoCal, South), demonstrating a willingness to travel and test the game against diverse styles of play from coast to coast.

zaph_j_din_bayona.name: Zaph J-Din Bayona
zaph_j_din_bayona.summary:
Zaph J-Din Bayona is a proven champion with 5 tournament titles to go along with 2 Finals and 9 semifinal appearances across 22 tournaments. That kind of consistency at the top doesn't happen by accident — it's the product of relentless preparation and fierce competitive instinct.

A true triple-threat, Zaph competes across singles, doubles, and mixed doubles — boasting 1 singles title, 4 doubles titles, a mixed doubles best of #2. The ability to excel in all three disciplines reveals a player with both the individual brilliance to dominate rallies and the court sense to thrive with a partner.

Signature achievements: 2 ORC titles (across 2 tournaments) • U.S. Selection Event top-3 finisher.

Zaph has demonstrated remarkable doubles adaptability, partnering with 18 different players across the career. Key partnerships:
  • Arjun Aditya Hariharan — 7 events, 1 title together in BD/U13
  • Yifei Zhang — 6 events together in BD, producing an outstanding 2 titles
  • Shaoyao Luo — a trusted XD partner (4 events, best result: #2)

A veteran of the junior circuit, Zaph has competed across U13, U15 and U17, accumulating invaluable experience at every age group. That depth of competitive history is an asset that younger opponents simply cannot replicate.

Zaph has competed across 4 different regions of the country (NE, NW, SoCal, South), demonstrating a willingness to travel and test the game against diverse styles of play from coast to coast.

With 9 seeded entries across the career, Zaph consistently earns the respect of tournament committees — a testament to the results put up on the court.

With 4 seasons of competitive experience and 5 titles to show for it, Zaph is a battle-hardened competitor whose journey is a testament to what dedication, talent, and love for the game can produce.

zisheng_gaogao_fan.name: Zisheng (GaoGao) Fan
zisheng_gaogao_fan.summary:
Zisheng (GaoGao) Fan is a proven champion with 7 tournament titles to go along with 2 Finals and 9 semifinal appearances across 30 tournaments. That kind of consistency at the top doesn't happen by accident — it's the product of relentless preparation and fierce competitive instinct.

A true triple-threat, Zisheng competes across singles, doubles, and mixed doubles — boasting 2 singles titles, 3 doubles titles, 2 mixed doubles titles. The ability to excel in all three disciplines reveals a player with both the individual brilliance to dominate rallies and the court sense to thrive with a partner.

Signature achievements: 3 ORC titles (across 3 tournaments).

Zisheng has demonstrated remarkable doubles adaptability, partnering with 19 different players across the career. Key partnerships:
  • Michael Liu — 10 events together in BD, producing an outstanding 2 titles
  • Sitar Nainish Sanghani — a trusted U13/XD partner (8 events, best result: #5)
  • Jason Gu — a trusted BD partner (7 events, best result: #3)

The 2025-2026 season has been outstanding, with 5 podium finishes across 6 tournaments. Zisheng is playing some of the best badminton of the career right now.

A veteran of the junior circuit, Zisheng has competed across U11, U13, U15 and U17, accumulating invaluable experience at every age group. That depth of competitive history is an asset that younger opponents simply cannot replicate.

Zisheng has competed across 6 different regions of the country (Midwest, NE, NW, NorCal, SoCal, South), demonstrating a willingness to travel and test the game against diverse styles of play from coast to coast.

With 22 seeded entries across the career, Zisheng consistently earns the respect of tournament committees — a testament to the results put up on the court.

With 5 seasons of competitive experience and 7 titles to show for it, Zisheng is a battle-hardened competitor whose journey is a testament to what dedication, talent, and love for the game can produce.
